CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_GIS_Proximity_Check when the project location intersects or is within the buffer of a designated Wild and Scenic River segment. Triggers Wild and Scenic Rivers Act Section 7 compliance review and Rivers and Harbors Act Section 10 permit requirement. Source: USFS EDW Wild and Scenic River Segments MapServer.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Project intersects a Wild and Scenic River corridor. Wild and Scenic Rivers Act Section 7 compliance and Rivers and Harbors Act Section 10 permit required.
CustomField.label: Wild and Scenic River Flag
